name: healthcare_model_based_triage_tool_begins_harbor_jus_mer
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare model based triage tool begins harbor jus mer. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as justice vs mercy under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Elliot Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Elliot Nielsen, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays mercy for justice.

agents.name: Ravi Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Ravi Alvarez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so mercy isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of justice.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect mercy.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to mercy to secure justice under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Elliot Nielsen must decide under justice vs mercy. What does Elliot Nielsen do?
